recommendations.title: Singham
recommendations.overview: An honest, small town cop is transferred to a big city that is controlled by a crime boss that he had once humiliated.

recommendations.title: 3, 2, 1... Frankie Go Boom
recommendations.overview: Frank Bartlett has been tortured, embarrassed, and humiliated by his brother Bruce — usually on film — his entire life. Now that Bruce is finally off drugs and has turned his life around, things should be different. They are not.

recommendations.title: Coup de Torchon
recommendations.overview: A pathetic police chief, humiliated by everyone around him, suddenly wants a clean slate in life, and resorts to drastic means to achieve it.

recommendations.title: Kuroko's Basketball the Movie: Last Game
recommendations.overview: Kuroko reunites with the "Generation of Miracles" when former rivals are humiliated in an exhibition game against a notorious street basketball team.

recommendations.title: Can't Hardly Wait
recommendations.overview: It's graduation day at Huntington Hills High, and you know what that means - time to party. And not just any party, either. This one will be a night to remember, as the nerds become studs, the jocks are humiliated, and freshman crushes blossom into g

recommendations.title: Mr Malcolm's List
recommendations.overview: When she fails to meet an item on his list of requirements for a bride, Julia Thistlewaite is jilted by London’s most eligible bachelor, Mr. Malcolm. Feeling humiliated and determined to exact revenge, she convinces her friend Selina Dalton to play t

recommendations.title: The Surfer
recommendations.overview: A man returns to the idyllic beach of his childhood to surf with his son. When he is humiliated by a group of locals, the man is drawn into a conflict that keeps rising and pushes him to his breaking point.

recommendations.title: Every Day
recommendations.overview: 16-year old Rhiannon falls in love with a mysterious spirit named “A” that inhabits a different body every day. Feeling an unmatched connection, Rhiannon and “A” work each day to find each other, not knowing what the next day will bring.

recommendations.title: The Man from the Future
recommendations.overview: Zero is a brilliant scientist. However, 20 years ago, he was publicly humiliated when he lost Helena, the love of his life. One day, an accidental experience with one of his inventions causes him to travel back in time to 1991. Having taken the oppor

recommendations.title: Roma
recommendations.overview: In 1970s Mexico City, two domestic workers help a mother of four while her husband is away for an extended period of time.
